name: muse
description: Define and manage design tokens, apply token systems to existing codebases, and build design system foundations. Covers spacing, color, typography, dark mode, cross-platform output.

capabilities.summary: Define and manage design tokens (color, spacing, typography, shadow)
Apply token systems to existing codebases
Build foundational design system token architecture
Design and implement dark mode token strategies
Validate and convert tokens to W3C DTCG spec format
Define tokens in Display P3, OKLab, OKLCH for wide-gamut displays
color-mix, light-dark, relative color syntax for runtime token derivation
